pkt-lease-fleet-project.summary: Project context for the lease-based model fleet runtime sprint. Covers actor registry schema, logical operator routing, context store, and DAG dispatch infrastructure.

goals: Add actor and host registry schema/config fixtures with compatibility aliases
Define 16 P0 logical operator types with binding table
Context store schema for project/task/memory packets
DAG node schema that rejects direct physical ids without compatibility=true
constraints: All new schemas must pass jsonschema validation
All 15 physical operators must have actor entries with operator_alias
tmux_pane_index must only appear in display_meta
Critical task envelopes must have context_packet_ref or embedded context_packet

pkt-n2-builder-task.summary: Task context for N2 Builder node: schema fixtures for actor registry, host registry, logical operators, and context store.

content.goal: Add actor and host registry schema/config fixtures with compatibility aliases from existing physical operators.

pkt-memory-actor-schema-lessons.summary: Compressed lessons from N2 schema design: capability_profile/risk_profile/cost_profile separation, why tmux_pane_index belongs only in display_meta, and how compatibility aliases bridge physical-operators.json to logical routing.

key_decisions: Legacy 'capability' field retained in schema for backward compat; new capability_profile/risk_profile/cost_profile added as parallel optional fields
tmux_pane_index is display metadata only — actor_id is the durable key; confirmed by schema additionalProperties:false on display_meta
All 15 physical operators map 1:1 to actor entries via operator_alias field
context_packet_ref and evidence_ledger_ref are null when actor is idle, populated at dispatch time
DAG node physical id rejection uses JSON Schema if/then: if compatibility != true, then disallow physical_actor_id/physical_operator_id/physical_model_id
schema_patterns: additionalProperties: false on leaf objects to catch typos
patternProperties for open-ended capability score maps
if/then for conditional required fields (critical task envelope, task packet)
